title: LookupInput
description: Discriminated union on `mode`. search → BM25 over adapter registry. fetch → typed invocation of a specific adapter by id.

query.description: Korean or English free-text describing the data you want.

top_k.description: Per-call override; server-side clamp [1, 20]. If null, uses KOSMOS_LOOKUP_TOPK default (5).

tool_id.description: Must come from a previous `search` result. Never guess.

params.description: Validated against the target adapter's input_schema at fetch time.
